uk_residency_rule: All production, preprod restore, and disaster-recovery data paths remain UK-hosted. No DR promotion may target a non-UK region.

regions.usage: Normal write path for managed environments.
Warm standby, restore rehearsal target, failover target, and replay target for declared store classes.
Developer-only local execution; not authority for production or DR posture.

environment_region_bindings.notes: Local builds may emulate topology but are never production authority.
Ephemeral preview posture in the primary UK role only.
Simulator-backed verification ring before restore rehearsal.
Restore rehearsal and failover validation ring.
Secondary region stays warm and promotable only under declared authority.

store_classes.name: FHIR-capable relational store
store_classes.primary_posture: Primary-region writable, tenant-partitioned logical schemas or keys.
store_classes.secondary_posture: Warm replica in secondary UK region; promotion requires restore proof, publication parity, and scope-tuple refresh.
store_classes.failover_user_posture: command_halt then read_only until tuple refresh and projection readiness converge

store_classes.name: Object and artifact storage
store_classes.primary_posture: Primary-region writes with immutable object manifests and malware posture.
store_classes.secondary_posture: Cross-region UK replication with manifest parity verification before promotion.
store_classes.failover_user_posture: summary_only or governed handoff until artifact parity recovers

store_classes.name: Event bus, queue, and outbox checkpoints
store_classes.primary_posture: Primary-region active dispatch and callback correlation.
store_classes.secondary_posture: Checkpointed durable mirror; replay from durable checkpoints only.
store_classes.failover_user_posture: integration_queue_only and command_halt for affected routes

store_classes.name: Projection read store
store_classes.secondary_posture: Warm or rebuildable copy; readiness verdict required before live claims.

store_classes.name: Append-only audit and assurance ledger
store_classes.secondary_posture: Replicated or dual-written UK evidence path with continuity verification.
store_classes.failover_user_posture: diagnostic_copy_only until resilience tuple becomes exact

store_classes.name: Ephemeral cache and shell continuity cache
store_classes.primary_posture: Region-local disposable cache keyed by tenant tuple.
store_classes.secondary_posture: Cold or disposable; never authoritative during failover.
store_classes.failover_user_posture: recompute from projection or drop to recovery_only

queue_and_outbox_posture: Every external effect originates from an outbox or durable queue checkpoint in the primary region.
Secondary-region activation replays only durable checkpoints and authoritative correlation state.
Gateways never bypass queue or outbox discipline for failover expediency.

failover_authorities.role: ResilienceOrchestrator proposes restore or failover posture from exact runtime truth.
Operations drilldown may execute declared actions only while the resilience tuple and watch tuple remain exact.
Governance must approve platform or multi-tenant blast-radius widening, rollback stand-down, and exceptional recovery scope.

degraded_user_postures.reason: ScopedMutationGate freezes mutation on tuple or runtime drift.

degraded_user_postures.posture: masked replay visible, restore controls frozen
degraded_user_postures.reason: InvestigationScopeEnvelope remains visible, but restore authority halts on drift.
ReleaseWatchTuple and resilience tuple decide authority, not dashboard-local state.

source_refs: phase-9-the-assurance-ledger.md#9F. Resilience architecture, restore orchestration, and chaos programme
